headline: Snowflake, Micron, Unusual Machines, and More Stocks That Explain the Market Today
summary: Investors also received another data point on inflation, as the Federal Reserve’s preferred inflation gauge, the PCE price index, accelerated to 3.8% in April, well above the 2% target.  The  the  and the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite all trended lower Thursday.  Balancing the macro trends, Snowflake stock surged 36% after fiscal first-quarter profit smashed Wall Street’s target, potentially dispelling fears that artificial intelligence would destroy its business.

headline: After Comparing Every Generative AI ETF These 3 Capture the Software Layer Most Investors Miss
